commands.review_summary:
The PR removes one stale auth test import, loosens a bundled-channel fixture field to readonly IDs, and types a spawnSync test probe as string output.

PR surface: Tests -1. Total -1 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. The source drift is visible on current main, and the PR body gives focused test, lint, diff-check, and Crabbox changed-gate commands; I did not rerun the repo checks because this review was read-only.

target.title: test(core): align changed gate type fixtures
target.body:
## Summary

Rebased the changed-gate unblocker onto current `origin/main` and pruned it down to the remaining test-fixture type/lint fixes not already present on main.

- Remove a stale legacy OAuth sidecar import from the auth-profile save tests.
- Accept readonly bundled channel ids in the bundled channel shape guard test.
- Type the encoded `spawnSync` result in the plugin SDK channel-entry contract test and remove redundant string conversions.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/auth-profiles.store.save.test.ts src/channels/plugins/bundled.shape-guard.test.ts src/plugin-sdk/channel-entry-contract.test.ts` passed: 3 shards, 57 tests, 9.00s.
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check src/agents/auth-profiles.store.save.test.ts src/channels/plugins/bundled.shape-guard.test.ts src/plugin-sdk/channel-entry-contract.test.ts` passed.
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/plugin-sdk/channel-entry-contract.test.ts` passed.
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD` passed.
- AWS Crabbox `pnpm check:changed` passed on current main `ce547bfd44a`: run `run_b8ffd12c3c1d`, lease `cbx_012e45889871` / `swift-shrimp`, provider `aws`, head `eeac814daa9`.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Current changed-gate core/plugin contract test fixtures are aligned with stricter type and lint surfaces so the schema-runtime PR proof can proceed without carrying broad current-main drift.

Real environment tested: Local linked worktree via repo Vitest/format/lint wrappers; remote AWS Crabbox changed gate.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: See Verification above.

Evidence after fix: Focused test files pass locally after rebasing onto current main. Remote `pnpm check:changed` completed all selected lanes: `core`, `coreTests`, `extensions`, and `extensionTests`.

Observed result after fix: The branch diff is 3 test files, +7/-8; overlapping auth/status/TTS/Codex/gateway cleanup that landed on main was dropped during rebase.

What was not tested: No live channel/provider behavior; this PR only updates test fixtures selected by the changed gate.
